title: Orbital Tnt crossbow
description: A crossbow that shoots tnt in a circle
body:
A crossbow that shoots tnt in a circle like wemmbu's orbital strike cannon! 
also usefull for custom weapon idea,or in a scripted smp.
used on the unbound smp:owned by cinbu,tripz,ke and Me ofcourse (i dont really own it)
dm primecriminal for help.

/crossbowtnt to get it!

also made by MiyuHT3 a 13 year old minecrafter who likes to make plugins.
